narrative.text: Hello, everyone! It’s great to finally meet! My name is Dr H. I'm the supervisor for the mutual aid network here in Tompkins County, New York!
The Covid-19 pandemic led to increased levels of food insecurity across the world, and government and charitable organizations did not always respond quickly enough to the needs of the community.
That’s why we decided to help each other!
Mutual Aid (MA) is when neighbors work together to meet survival needs-mobilised residents to share food, often through outdoor food cabinets and refrigerators.
Your job as a volunteer is to collect food donations, inspect for food quality, and help improve food insecurity in our neighborhood by planning where we station pantries!
First, let us tackle the basics. There is one house on screen. Place the pantry near the house to supply food to the house.
